title: Role update regresses last-admin safeguard
description: The new role update path can demote the final administrator.
requirement: REQ-REGRESS-1: A team must retain at least one administrator; role updates that would demote the final admin must be rejected.
seededViolation: The role update writes the requested role without checking remaining administrators.
whyItMatters: A team can become permanently unmanaged.

expectedFindings.title: Role change can demote the final administrator
expectedFindings.description: The update lacks the required last-admin safety check.

distractors.description: The target membership is checked for existence.
distractors.reasonNotAnIssue: Rejecting an unknown membership is required input handling.
